text: home of the Danish royal family
One of the most significant landmarks in Copenhagen, both historically and politically.
It's a large complex, so allow plenty of time to explore.
Wear comfortable shoes as you'll be climbing up the tower.
Make sure to book your table in advance as it's a world-famous restaurant.
It's an outdoor attraction so check the weather before you go.
As it's a popular spot, try to visit on a weekday when it's less crowded.
